description: Celebrate traditional style with this dupatta from fabindia. The stylish print and mix of colours make this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Approximate Length: 240 cmOff-white and pink printed cotton mull woven dupattaStitched hemsWash careDry clean only
